zh.lifeSummary: 當Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Isles於大約1170年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾莫文時，他的父親Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles24歲，母親Fonia Moray26歲。他於大約1242年與Beatrix Stewart在蘇格蘭阿吉爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於從1250年到1252年，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Isles于大约1170年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾莫文时，他的父亲Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles24岁，母亲Fonia Moray26岁。他于大约1242年与Beatrix Stewart在苏格兰阿吉爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于从1250年到1252年，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Mac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Cuong, Minh, Lien, Muoi, Thanh, Tho, Tieu, Vinh, Anh, Beo, Binh, Chau.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 麥 (see   Mai   2) and 莫 (see   Mo   1).
Vietnamese (Mạc): from Chinese 莫 ‘nothing; nonexistent’; see Mo 1.

variants.name: Mai
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Thanh, Hoa, Son, Dung, Long, Binh, Minh, Thu, Hue, Huong, Thuy.  Chinese Chi, Hong, Ho, Sang, Han, Hang, Jian, Li, Man, Mei, Sen, Wei.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 麥, meaning ‘wheat’ in Chinese: (i) from Mai Qiu (麥丘), the title of a man in the state of Qi (located mainly in present-day Shandong province) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), who, despite being very old, came to celebrate the birthday of the Duke Huan of Qi (ruler of the state of Qi, died 643  BC ). His descendants inherited 麥, the first part of his title, as their surname. (ii) borne by descendants of Mai Tie Zhang (麥鐵杖), a famous general during the Sui dynasty (581–618  AD ). His descendants were scattered around southern China.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 買, meaning ‘buy’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of the king Song Weizi, founder of the state of Song. (ii) borne by descendants of the Duke Dao of Xu (ruler of the state of Xu, 546–523  BC ), possibly inheriting his personal name. (iii) from the first element of the personal name Mai Zhu Chu (買朱鉏), style name of an official who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iv) it has also been traced back to other ethnic groups in northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Donald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Gaelic Domhnall . The final -d of the Anglicized form derives partly from misinterpretation by English speakers of the Gaelic pronunciation, and partly from association with Germanic-origin names such as Ronald . This name is strongly associated with clan Macdonald, the clan of the medieval Lords of the Isles, but is now also widely used by families with no Scottish connections.

en.lifeSummary: When Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Isles was born about 1170, in Morven, Argyll, Scotland, his father, Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles, was 24 and his mother, Fonia Moray, was 26. He married Beatrix Stewart about 1242, in Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died from 1250 to 1252, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Isles est né environ 1170, à Morven, Argyll, Écosse, son père, Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Fonia Moray, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Beatrix Stewart environ 1242, à Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé du 1250 au 1252, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Isles um 1170 in Morven, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles 24 und seine Mutter Fonia Moray 26. Er hat um 1242 in Argyll, Scotland Beatrix Stewart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb von 1250 bis 1252 und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Isles è nato il circa 1170 nel Morven, Argyll, Scotland, il suo padre, Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Fonia Moray, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Beatrix Stewart circa 1242, nel Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì da 1250 a 1252, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Islesが約1170年にスコットランドアルグイルモーベンで生まれた時，父Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Islesは24歳，母Fonia Morayは26歳であった。約1242年にスコットランドアルグイルでBeatrix Stewartと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼はから1250年まで1252年に死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Isles(이)가 대략 1170년 스컷랜드 아그이 모르븐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Fonia Moray(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1242년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 Beatrix Stewart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1250년 부터 1252년 까지 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Isles nasceu aproximadamente 1170, em Morven, Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Fonia Moray, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrix Stewart aproximadamente 1242, em Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu de 1250 a 1252, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Isles родился около 1170 г. в местности морвен, аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Fonia Moray, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrix Stewart около 1242 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер с 1250 по 1252 и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

sm.about 1170–from 1250 to 1252: e tusa o le 1170–mai le 1250 e o'o I le 1252
sm.from 1250 to 1252: mai le 1250 e o'o I le 1252

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Isles nació aproximadamente 1170, en Morven, Argyll, Scotland, su papá, Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Fonia Moray, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Beatrix Stewart aproximadamente 1242, en Argyll, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió desde 1250 hasta 1252, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
